requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — 240 V / 50 Hz / Type I (AS/NZS 3112) Standard

summary.en: Papua New Guinea uses 240 V / 50 Hz mains electricity with the Australian Type I (AS/NZS 3112) three-pin plug standard. Electrical products, including wireless and IoT devices with mains power supplies, must be compatible with this voltage and plug type. PNG does not operate a standalone national electrical safety certification scheme equivalent to Australia's EESS; however, devices should be assessed for electrical safety and compatibility with PNG's mains standard. NICTA type approval may encompass electrical safety review for telecom terminal equipment.
summary.zh: 巴布亚新几内亚采用240V / 50Hz市电，使用澳大利亚I型（AS/NZS 3112）三脚插头标准。包含市电电源的无线及物联网设备等电气产品，须与此电压及插头类型兼容。PNG没有相当于澳大利亚EESS的独立国家电气安全认证体系；但设备应针对电气安全及与PNG市电标准的兼容性进行评估。NICTA型式核准可能涵盖电信终端设备的电气安全审查。
summary.zht: 巴布亞紐幾內亞採用240V / 50Hz市電，使用澳洲I型（AS/NZS 3112）三腳插頭標準。包含市電電源的無線及物聯網裝置等電氣產品，須與此電壓及插頭類型相容。PNG沒有相當於澳洲EESS的獨立國家電氣安全認證體系；但設備應針對電氣安全及與PNG市電標準的相容性進行評估。NICTA型式核准可能涵蓋電信終端設備的電氣安全審查。

standards_or_laws: AS/NZS 3112 (plug and socket standard, adopted in practice in PNG)
AS/NZS 60950-1 / AS/NZS 62368-1 (potential reference standards for IT and A/V equipment electrical safety)

summary.en: China uses 220 V / 50 Hz mains with the GB 2099-series plug standard (Type A, C, and I variants). CCC certification under GB 4943.1 (IEC 62368-1 equivalent) covers electrical safety for IT and telecom equipment. Products designed for China use Type A/C plugs or Type I variants not identical to the Australian AS/NZS 3112 standard.
summary.zh: 中国采用220V / 50Hz市电，使用GB 2099系列插头标准（A型、C型及I型变体）。依据GB 4943.1（等效于IEC 62368-1）的CCC认证涵盖信息技术及电信设备的电气安全。面向中国市场设计的产品采用A型/C型插头或与澳大利亚AS/NZS 3112标准不完全相同的I型变体。
summary.zht: 中國採用220V / 50Hz市電，使用GB 2099系列插頭標準（A型、C型及I型變體）。依據GB 4943.1（等效於IEC 62368-1）的CCC認證涵蓋資訊技術及電信設備的電氣安全。面向中國市場設計的產品採用A型/C型插頭或與澳洲AS/NZS 3112標準不完全相同的I型變體。

standards_or_laws: GB 4943.1 (IEC 62368-1 equivalent — IT and A/V equipment safety)

gap.en: China-designed products use 220 V and Chinese plug types. For PNG, the power supply must support 240 V / 50 Hz and the device or adapter must be fitted with or compatible with the Australian Type I (AS/NZS 3112) plug. CCC electrical safety certification does not satisfy any PNG or Australian-derived electrical safety requirement. AS/NZS 62368-1 or AS/NZS 60950-1 compliance documentation strengthens NICTA type approval applications.
gap.zh: 中国设计的产品使用220V及中国插头类型。用于PNG的电源须支持240V / 50Hz，设备或适配器须配备或兼容澳大利亚I型（AS/NZS 3112）插头。CCC电气安全认证不满足任何PNG或澳大利亚衍生的电气安全要求。AS/NZS 62368-1或AS/NZS 60950-1合规文件有助于增强NICTA型式核准申请。
gap.zht: 中國設計的產品使用220V及中國插頭類型。用於PNG的電源須支持240V / 50Hz，設備或適配器須配備或相容澳洲I型（AS/NZS 3112）插頭。CCC電氣安全認證不滿足任何PNG或澳洲衍生的電氣安全要求。AS/NZS 62368-1或AS/NZS 60950-1合規文件有助於增強NICTA型式核准申請。

source.publisher: National Information and Communications Technology Authority (NICTA), Papua New Guinea

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] PNG uses the Australian 240 V / 50 Hz / Type I (AS/NZS 3112) electrical standard. Chinese products designed for 220 V with Chinese plugs require voltage compatibility verification and plug adaptation for the PNG market. There is no standalone PNG electrical safety certification mark; compliance is assessed as part of NICTA type approval and general product safety obligations. CCC does not substitute for AS/NZS-based electrical safety documentation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] PNG采用澳大利亚240V / 50Hz / I型（AS/NZS 3112）电气标准。专为220V中国插头设计的中国产品，需进行电压兼容性验证并为PNG市场进行插头适配。PNG没有独立的电气安全认证标志；合规性在NICTA型式核准及一般产品安全义务框架下进行评估。CCC不能替代基于AS/NZS的电气安全文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] PNG採用澳洲240V / 50Hz / I型（AS/NZS 3112）電氣標準。專為220V中國插頭設計的中國產品，需進行電壓相容性驗證並為PNG市場進行插頭適配。PNG沒有獨立的電氣安全認證標誌；合規性在NICTA型式核准及一般產品安全義務框架下進行評估。CCC不能替代基於AS/NZS的電氣安全文件。
